posts.message:
Excuse me ma’am… just conducting a routine egg inspection 🪿😂

Every goose has their own opinion when it’s collection time around here! Safe to say they are very invested in their eggs.🥚

🌺Hanging baskets and Planters are available for Mothers Day or sprucing up your house for Spring! 🌸
